name: NISystem Standard Scripts
description: Pre-built Python scripts for common lab and industrial applications

scripts.name: Moving Average Filter
scripts.description: Smooths noisy sensor data using a configurable window

scripts.name: Rate of Change
scripts.description: Calculates derivative (rate per second) of any tag

scripts.name: Running Statistics
scripts.description: Rolling min, max, mean, and standard deviation

scripts.name: Peak Detector
scripts.description: Tracks and holds peak max/min values

scripts.name: Linear Scaling
scripts.description: Converts raw values to engineering units

scripts.name: Duty Cycle Monitor
scripts.description: Calculates ON time percentage for control signals

scripts.name: Thermal Efficiency
scripts.description: Heat transfer and efficiency from temperatures and flow

scripts.name: Delta Calculator
scripts.description: Simple difference between two tags (Delta_P, Delta_T)

scripts.name: Integrator / Totalizer
scripts.description: Accumulates values over time (energy, total flow)

scripts.name: Expression Calculator
scripts.description: Custom math expressions with multiple inputs

scripts.name: Setpoint Deviation
scripts.description: Monitors error from setpoint with tolerance band

scripts.name: Timed Sequence (Draw Schedule)
scripts.description: Run actions at specific times - valve open at 0s, close at 30s

scripts.name: Control Loop Schedule
scripts.description: Continuous control loop with multiple on/off and PID controls

scripts.name: Conditional Control (While Loop)
scripts.description: Execute actions while condition is true (while Temp < 60, heater ON)

scripts.name: State Machine
scripts.description: Multi-state process with conditional and timed transitions

scripts.name: Batch Recipe
scripts.description: Run batch recipes with steps that wait for conditions

categories.name: Process Control
categories.description: PID, setpoint tracking, and control logic

categories.name: Control Sequences
categories.description: Timed sequences, while loops, state machines, and batch recipes
